channel.title: M365-Copilot on A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Recent content in M365-Copilot on A Guide to Cloud & AI

item.title: What's New in M365 Copilot — March 2026
item.description: Stay up to date with the latest features and updates in Microsoft 365 Copilot for March 2026. This monthly roundup covers everything new — from agent improvements to UI changes.

item.title: What's New in M365 Copilot — Feb 2026
item.description: Monthly roundup of everything new in Microsoft 365 Copilot for February 2026.

item.title: Free Enterprise Copilot Chat Deep Dive
item.description: In this Free Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat Masterclass, I walk you through 18 powerful features available in Copilot Chat for Enterprise, and show how you can use them securely and effectively in real workplace scenarios.

item.title: Researcher Agent Explained
item.description: Explore the Researcher Agent’s full power in M365. Learn how to summarize, generate, and research efficiently with AI — step-by-step for all levels.
